---
title: "Lectures"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
format: 
  html: 
    format-links: false
  revealjs: 
    output-ext: "slides.html"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "lecture_*/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "title asc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
---

Welcome to the course lectures. Click on any card below to view the slides and materials for that topic, or use the search bar to find a specific lecture.
